source: Employment Tax Incentive Act, 2013 (Act No. 26 of 2013) as amended April 2025

eligibility.age_exemption: Age limit does not apply if employee renders services mainly inside a Special Economic Zone (SEZ)
employer_excluded: Schedule 2/3 public entities under PFMA (unless designated by Minister)

tiers.description: R1,500 minus 75% of amount above R5,500
R750 minus 37.5% of amount above R5,500

hours_proration.rule: If employee works fewer than 160 hours, gross up remuneration to 160-hour equivalent for tier calculation, then prorate the resulting ETI amount down by actual_hours / 160

rollover.rule: If employer's PAYE liability is less than the ETI amount in a month, the excess can be rolled over to subsequent months within the same reconciliation period (EMP201 period)

notes.qualifying_months: Count only months where employee was employed and paid. Not calendar months from start date.
notes.displaced_employees: Employer may be disqualified if an existing employee was displaced to hire an ETI-qualifying employee.
notes.sez_exception: For SEZ employees, the age limit (18-29) does not apply.
